greeting.home: Hi {name}, want a focused next step for Band {target_band}?
greeting.daily: Start with a small word set, {name}.
greeting.review: Your due cards are the fastest win right now.
greeting.vocab: Build your vocabulary path from here.
greeting.write: Ready to get sharper Writing feedback?
greeting.listening: A short Listening drill will keep your ear warm.
greeting.reading: Try one focused Reading passage and review the misses.
greeting.progress: Use progress to choose the next weakest skill.
greeting.settings: Tune your goals so Mario can guide you better.

panel.defaultMessage: Pick a focused next step and keep your IELTS rhythm moving.

chat.heading: Chat with Mario
chat.empty: Ask about this page, your next study step, or how to use the IELTS tools here.
